title: Cheesus
description: for all the cheese lovers out there
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf5daff411c45e388262ec9e5695a0b4521039fb.png)







It's all about cheese.
With this mod you can
create different types of
cheese, enjoy the cheese,
love the cheese.

this mod contains different kinds
of cheese, new redstone mechanics,
and good, cheesy food















Disclaimer: this isn't a cult, nor is this mod related to any religion whatsoever.


How To Cheese ![Cheese Process Guide](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bd315d2528abd596bb14476e01c885f27853624.png) For a more comprehensible description, take a visit on our [wiki](https://github.com/nudelauflauch/cheesus/wiki)!














[![github issues tracker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4731d4e766e9ca8573f3db41b87fa838b5ca3153.png)](https://github.com/nudelauflauch/cheesus/issues)
